metadata.title: About Niels & Vispaico | Anti-Agency Web Development Built in Vietnam
metadata.description: 🗺Meet Niels and the Vispaico team. We've built 138+ websites in Vietnam without the agency theater. Fast delivery, no jargon, straight results. Learn why we build differently.

hero.title: We Are Vispaico
paragraphs: Hi, I'm Niels. I built Vispaico because I was tired of the bullshit.
I've been writing code for 20+ years. Started in East Germany, worked across England, Belgium, and spent 15 years in Spain—mostly in the car industry, bouncing between factories and client sites.
The problem? I had an authority problem. Always did. Hated being told to wait, to slow down, to 'follow the process' when I knew we could ship faster.

After two decades of global travel (airports, hotels, meetings that could've been emails), I landed in Vietnam. Met my wife, started a family, and realized I was done moving. But I wasn't done building.
So I started Vispaico in 2019. The mission was simple: build websites the way they should be built—fast, modern, no agency markup, no waiting weeks for something that takes 24 hours.
hero.frustrationsHeading: Here's what pisses me off about this industry:
frustrations: Overpriced agencies charging $10K for a basic site
Slow WordPress sites that kill your credibility
Jargon-heavy devs who hide behind complexity
Waiting times that make no sense
differences: We ship in 72 hours (48 hours if you're in a rush, 24 if it's an emergency)
We cut everything that can be cut—AI handles the boring parts, scripts handle the tedious parts
We speak human, not dev jargon
hero.familyParagraph: The best part? I'm building this with my kids. My three kids watch me work, help with small tasks, and learn that you don't need permission to build something great. My oldest son from Spain works with me full-time now.
hero.lifestyleParagraph: This isn't just a business. It's a lifestyle, a mindset, and a way to stay free.
hero.closing: If you're tired of agencies that move like molasses, let's talk.

coreValues.title: Fast Delivery
coreValues.description: We build websites while agencies are still scheduling discovery calls. Speed is our advantage.

coreValues.title: Straight Talk
coreValues.description: No jargon, no buzzwords, no consultant speak. We explain things in plain English.

coreValues.title: Fixed Pricing
coreValues.description: One price, one timeline, no surprises. What we quote is what you pay.

coreValues.title: Real Results
coreValues.description: We build websites that work for your business, not our design portfolio.

team.name: Niels Teitge
team.bio: 25 years building websites. Specializes in AI automation for small businesses.

team.name: Do Thi Huyen
team.bio: Business strategy without the consultant speak. Gets projects moving fast.

team.name: Lukas Kacprzak
team.bio: Full-stack developer. Builds sites that load fast and work everywhere.

team.name: Nguyen Thi Anh Ly
team.bio: Creates clean, professional designs that convert visitors to customers.

team.name: Leroy Anh Minh
team.bio: Keeps projects on track and clients updated. No project manager fees.

join.description: If you're into AI and creative stuff and easy going,

Fill out this form and you'll receive the contract and invoice within a minute for you to review it. A Payment link is included - start as soon as you're ready.
Payment secures your spot on our calendar. We start immediately. You get updates daily. By Day 3, you're live.

 Worried? Book a 15-minute call with Niels first. He'll confirm we're the right fit.

steps.title: 1. Fill Out the Form
steps.description: Tell us about your business, goals, and ideas. Even rough notes work fine. We build from there.

steps.title: 2. We Send Contract & Invoice
steps.description: Clear terms, flat rate. If we need clarification, we will reach out directly (no meetings required).

steps.title: 3. We Build While You Work
steps.description: Our team gets to work immediately. You get updates, not meetings.

steps.title: 4. You Launch & Win
steps.description: Within 3 days, your website is live and ready for customers.

metadata.title: Website Growth Services | SEO Content, Maintenance, Conversion Optimization
metadata.description: Grow your website after launch. SEO content ($399-799/mo), maintenance + uptime ($249-499/mo), conversion optimization ($1,500-2,500). Retainers for $899 website launches.

hero.title: Launch is day one. Growth is everything after.
hero.subtitle: Your $899 website is the foundation. These services turn visitors into customers and keep the engine compounding.
hero.support: Pick the lever you need now. Layer the rest as you grow.

items.title: Growth Content
items.description: SEO content that compounds. Publish long-form articles that rank, resonate, and route leads into your CRM.
bullets: 4–8 SEO articles per month (1,500–2,500 words each)
Keyword research and content strategy aligned to buyer intent
Published directly through your CMS (you keep full control)
Optimized for Google, skimmability, and real conversion moments
items.why: We wrote eight articles for the Education Consultant. Three months later they had 150+ organic monthly visitors and inbound leads on autopilot.
items.cta: Talk to us about your content map

items.title: Maintenance + Uptime
items.description: Your website, always running. Monitoring, backups, security, and performance handled by the team that built it.
bullets: Daily automated backups with one-click restores
24/7 uptime monitoring with proactive fixes
Monthly security audits, patches, and compliance checks
Performance tuning so Core Web Vitals stay in the green
1-hour response time for critical issues
items.why: When your funnel never sleeps, neither do we. The Maintenance tier keeps uptime at 99.98% for high-intent traffic and launch campaigns.

items.title: Conversion Optimization
items.description: Turn visitors into customers with audits, testing, and data-backed redesigns.
bullets: Full funnel analysis to spot conversion leaks
Heat mapping and session replay to watch real users
Copy, CTA, and layout testing across key pages
Form experience optimization to remove friction
Redesign recommendations driven by data, not opinions
items.why: Average clients see a 20–40% conversion lift within 30 days because we test what matters and wire the learnings back into your site.

formula.title: The formula that works
formula.description: Stack the offers to build momentum: launch fast, drive traffic, keep uptime flawless, and squeeze every visit for value.
formula.note: Winning customers do all three. Budget-conscious founders pick one and grow into the rest.

hero.title: Three-Day Website Sprint
hero.subtitle: 72 hours from kickoff to launch-ready site. Flat $899.
bullets: Custom design + Next.js build + headless CMS
Domain, hosting, SSL, and email handled for you
Daily async updates, zero meetings, guaranteed launch

paragraphs: “I built this sprint because most teams drown in planning when what they need is a live site. Three focused days force clarity, momentum, and decisions. Agencies drag it out because that's how they bill.”
“Every extra week your site isn't live is lost revenue. A tight 72-hour window keeps everyone honest: you give us inputs, we ship the outcome.”

agencyTheater.title: Cut the agency theater
agencyTheater.subtitle: 3 days, one price, one outcome.
cons: No status calls about status calls
No template sites that look like everyone else
pros: You fill one form. We handle the rest.
Compliance-ready, Core Web Vitals in the green.
paragraphs: We take your notes, brand cues, and goals and translate them into a conversion-ready site that feels handcrafted—not templated.
Day 1 is research + design systems. Day 2 is build + integrations. Day 3 is QA, performance, and handoff.
agencyTheater.closing: We build while you keep running the business.

cards.title: Multi-page site

cards.title: Bespoke design

cards.title: 72-hour timeline
cards.description: Day 1 design. Day 2 build. Day 3 launch + training.

cards.title: Growth playbook
cards.description: You leave with CMS access, SOPs, and recommended next moves.

quickQuestions.title: Quick questions we hear daily

items.question: Is it truly live in 3 days?
answer: Yes. We share Loom updates daily. Deploy happens on Day 3 with DNS + SSL locked in.
Need it faster? We can compress to 48 hours if your inputs are ready.

items.question: What do you need from me?
answer: Brand basics, any must-have copy, and the primary call to action.
- company name
- offer or services
- testimonials or proof if you have it
That's it. Rough notes are fine—we'll polish.

items.question: Who owns the files and infrastructure?
answer: You do. We transfer the Git repo, CMS space, domain, hosting, analytics, and SOP doc.

items.question: Do you write the copy and source images?
answer: Yes. We'll draft conversion-focused copy and source licensed imagery. Send anything mandatory and we'll integrate it.

items.question: What happens after Day 3?
answer: 7 days of unlimited tweaks, 30 days of technical support, and optional hand-off to our growth, maintenance, or CRO retainers.

items.question: Is there any risk?
answer: Full refund if we miss the delivery window or the scope promised. We haven't missed yet.

quickQuestions.closingTitle: Still unsure? Email niels@vispaico.com—reply in hours, not days.

bottomLine.title: The bottom line
paragraphs: Every extra week spent waiting is a week competitors take your leads.
72 hours from now you can be live, legal, and ready to sell.

Here's why: Every day your site isn't live is a day you're losing customers. Three days is enough to look professional, get found, and start closing deals.”

Day 1: Design & Planning — Day 2-3: Build & Test — Day 3: Launch & Handover

cards.title: 72-Hour Delivery
cards.description: We mean it. Ready to launch in 3 days, not 3 months.

cards.title: Zero Stress
cards.description: No project managers, no status calls, no complications. Just results.

process.title: How It Works - No Meetings Required

items.question: Is this the right website for me?
answer: Yes, if you need a real online presence that works. Not just a brochure site that sits there.

This works for service businesses, consultants, e-commerce stores, SaaS founders, agencies, education platforms—anyone who needs visitors to find them, understand what they do, and take action (book a call, make a purchase, sign up).
It doesn't work if: You need a website in 4 hours (we need 3 days) or you want us to run your marketing (we build the foundation; you drive the traffic).
Unsure? Email niels@vispaico.com. We'll tell you straight up if we're the right fit.

items.question: What information do you need from me?
answer: Not much:
Your business name
What you actually do (1-2 sentences is fine)
Your main goal (sell products? Generate leads? Build authority?)
Any text or images you want included
Rough notes work. A brain dump works. We'll build from there.
If you have nothing, we can source images and write copy for you—just tell us.

items.question: Do you write the content, or do I?
answer: We do the heavy lifting.
We'll write your homepage copy, about page, service descriptions—whatever tells your story clearly. If you have existing content, send it. If you don't, we write it.
Same with images: we source them (or you provide your own). We handle the layout and optimization.
Your job: Give us your business details and approve it. That's it.

items.question: What about the Domain, Hosting, and Emails?
answer: Everything's included for 1 year. You don't touch anything:
✓ Domain registration (brand new domain or transfer yours)
✓ Web hosting (fast, reliable, no monthly surprises)
✓ SSL security (encrypted, professional, HTTPS)
✓ GDPR compliant (forms, tracking, data handling—all legal)
✓ Professional email addresses (up to 10 accounts)
✓ Instructions to connect to Outlook, Apple Mail, Gmail, whatever you use
Year 2: You renew the domain + hosting directly (~$120-180/year) or we can handle renewals for you. No lock-in.

items.question: What if I need to make changes after launch?
answer: 7 days: Unlimited revisions. Anything you want adjusted, we fix it.
Days 8-30: Free technical support for bugs or questions.
After 30 days: You own everything. Change it yourself (via the CMS) or add us to a maintenance plan if you want ongoing support.
100% satisfaction guarantee: If we don't deliver what we promised, you get a full refund. We mean it.

items.question: Can I manage the website myself after launch?
answer: Yes.
Your site includes a headless CMS (Storyblok). You can:
Write and publish articles anytime
Update content without coding
Add new pages when you're ready
Manage everything yourself
But you don't have to. If you want us to handle content, maintenance, or updates, that's what our growth services are for.

items.question: What makes this different from other agencies?
answer: Three things:
1. Speed
We don't do discovery calls, mood boards, or revision loops. We build. You launch. 3 days, not 3 months.
2. Honesty
One price. One timeline. No surprises. No project managers charging you to manage meetings about meetings. No "scope creep" because the scope is clear from day one.
3. Real tech
Most agencies use outdated page builders that trap you. We use Next.js + headless CMS. Your site can grow into anything—dashboards, e-commerce, complex features. You're not limited by templates.

items.question: What happens on Day 1, Day 2, Day 3?
answer: Day 1: We design your site based on your info and build the foundation.
Day 2-3: We build, test, integrate email, optimize for Google, deploy to live servers.
Day 3 evening: Your site is live. We send you the keys. You launch.
Days 4-30: Free support for any questions or bugs.

items.question: What's the catch?
answer: There isn't one.
We charge $899 because we built a process that works fast. We don't charge a premium for speed—we pass the savings to you.
You own everything. No licensing fees. No monthly platform costs. No lock-in.
Year 2, if you want to leave, you leave. Your site keeps running.

items.question: I'm still not sure. What do I do?
answer: Fill out the form. We'll send you the contract (no obligation to sign).
Or email niels@vispaico.com and ask anything. He'll reply within a few hours.

bottomLine.title: The Bottom Line
paragraphs: While agencies schedule meetings to discuss scheduling meetings, your website launches.

metadata.title: Vispaico FAQ | Website Pricing, Timeline, Support, Tech Stack
metadata.description: 🧩FAQ: How fast can you build a website? What's included? Do I own the site? Can I manage it myself? Answers to common questions about Vispaico's $899 website service.

items.question: What is Vispaico?
items.answer: We're a web development team that builds professional websites fast without the agency nonsense. No discovery calls, no project managers, no 6-month timelines. Just websites that work, delivered when promised.

items.question: Why should I choose you over a local web agency?
items.answer: Agencies charge $5k-15k and take 3-6 months with endless meetings. We deliver the same quality in days, not months, for a fraction of the cost. Plus you own everything - no monthly hosting fees or maintenance contracts.

items.question: What if I don't like the design?
items.answer: You get 7 days of unlimited revisions after delivery. We keep tweaking until you're happy. Most clients love the first version, but we're not done until you are.

items.question: Do you handle content and copywriting?
items.answer: Yes. If you don't have content ready, we'll write it for you. Just tell us about your business in your own words - we'll turn it into professional web copy that converts.

items.question: What happens after my website is built?
items.answer: You own everything. The website, domain, hosting, and all files. You can update it yourself or hire anyone to maintain it. No vendor lock-in, no ongoing fees unless you want our help.

items.question: Do you provide ongoing support and maintenance?
items.answer: We include 30 days of technical support and 7 days of revisions with every project. After that, ongoing maintenance is optional - many clients prefer to handle updates themselves since we build user-friendly sites.

items.question: Can I see examples of your work?
items.answer: Absolutely! Visit our Portfolio to see real projects we've built for restaurants, contractors, consultants, and online stores.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Choose your service and fill out the form. You'll get a contract and invoice within an hour. Pay when you're ready to start, and we'll have your site live within the promised timeframe.

items.question: Do you have a Technical Support policy?
items.answer: YES, 30 days of technical bug fixes included after project delivery. If something breaks due to our code, we fix it free.

items.question: Do you have a Revisions policy?
items.answer: YES, 7 days of unlimited revisions after delivery. Change colors, text, layout - whatever you need to make it perfect.

items.question: Do you have a money back policy?
items.answer: YES, full refund if we can't deliver what we promised within 24 hours of supposed completion. We've never had to use it, but it's there for your peace of mind.

items.question: Do you do SEO?
items.answer: Every website we build is SEO-optimized from day one - proper titles, meta descriptions, fast loading, mobile-friendly. We don't do ongoing SEO campaigns, but your site will be found on Google.

items.question: What about hosting and domains?
items.answer: Included for 1 year with most services. We register your domain, set up hosting, security/SSL, and configure everything. After 1 year, you can renew with us or take it anywhere - you own it all.
